recommendations.title: Three Kingdoms: Resurrection of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: The aging Zhao embarks on his final and greatest campaign, a road to adventure that will crown his name in glory for all time.

recommendations.title: 14 Blades
recommendations.overview: Commander Qinglong is the loyal leader of the assassin group that serves the emperor. But when his allies plan a rebellion against the ruler, he finds himself in danger.

recommendations.title: In the Mood for Love
recommendations.overview: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.

recommendations.title: Big Brother
recommendations.overview: A soldier-turned-high school teacher uses unusual methods to reach to a class of poor students, while dealing with a greedy entrepreneur and his gang of fighters as well as the government.

recommendations.title: Dragon Blade
recommendations.overview: Huo An, the commander of the Protection Squad of the Western Regions, was framed by evil forces and becomes enslaved. On the other hand, a Roman general escapes to China after rescuing the Prince. The heroic duo meet in the Western Desert and a thril

recommendations.title: Fallen Angels
recommendations.overview: An assassin goes through obstacles as he attempts to escape his violent lifestyle despite the opposition of his partner, who is secretly attracted to him.

recommendations.title: Chungking Express
recommendations.overview: Two melancholic Hong Kong policemen fall in love: one with a mysterious underworld figure, the other with a beautiful and ethereal server at a late-night restaurant.

recommendations.title: As Tears Go By
recommendations.overview: Mid-level gangster Wah falls in love with his beautiful cousin, but must also continue to protect his volatile partner-in-crime and friend, Fly.

recommendations.title: Happy Together
recommendations.overview: A couple travels from Hong Kong to Argentina to revive their relationship but experience turbulence when both men's lives drift in separate directions.

recommendations.title: Days of Being Wild
recommendations.overview: Yuddy, a Hong Kong playboy known for breaking girls' hearts, tries to find solace and truth after discovering the woman who raised him isn't his mother.
